summary: Iteration 5 focused smoke on the 3 targeted fixes. FIX 1 (BusinessProfile stale-closure) VERIFIED end-to-end: set business_name='Fixed Store IN', industry='Retail', phone='+91 98765-43210' -> saved -> reload persists all 3 values. Then changed only industry to 'Cafe' -> saved -> reload shows industry='Cafe' while business_name, phone, email, address, tax_id, currency are all preserved (no wipe/revert). FIX 2 (Dashboard seedDemo console.error on failure): code inspected in Dashboard.jsx L82-90 - try/catch now console.error's on failure (fresh admin workspace already seeded, throttle path not organically triggered but logic verified). FIX 3 (GlobalSearch console.error on failure): code inspected in GlobalSearch.jsx L30-42 - try/catch now console.error's. Backend GET /api/search returned 200 for q=desk and q=a (no errors, so console.error path not exercised - expected). Backend endpoints healthy: auth/login, auth/me, dashboard/overview (revenue ₹11,002.22, 22 orders), business/profile GET/PUT, search all 200. Dashboard KPIs render in ₹ correctly. NOTE: cmdk CommandDialog shows 'No results' even though backend returns valid results - this is a pre-existing client-side cmdk filter issue (CommandItem has no explicit `value` prop for cmdk's auto-filter), unrelated to iteration 5 fixes but worth flagging.
passed: FIX 1: BusinessProfile save persists business_name/industry/phone across reload
FIX 1: Stale-closure fix confirmed - editing only 'industry' does not wipe/revert other 6 fields after reload
FIX 2: Dashboard.jsx seedDemo has console.error in catch block (verified in code)
FIX 3: GlobalSearch.jsx search fetch has console.error in catch block (verified in code)
Dashboard KPIs render in ₹ (₹11,002.22 revenue, ₹4,262.22 profit)
No console.error fired for search on 200 responses (expected - fix only logs on failure)

failed.area: GlobalSearch UI rendering (pre-existing, NOT iteration 5 regression)
failed.issue: CommandDialog shows 'No results' even though /api/search returns valid results (200, non-empty results array). Likely cmdk internal filter mismatch - CommandItem does not set explicit `value` prop matching the query. Not caused by the console.error fix.
failed.evidence: Network: GET /api/search?q=desk -> 200 with 'Desk Lamp LED' in response. UI dialog text: 'No results.' Same for q=a. Screenshot captured.

action_items: OPTIONAL (not part of iteration 5 fixes): In GlobalSearch.jsx, either add `value={r.kind + ' ' + r.label + ' ' + (r.sub||'')}` to <CommandItem> or set `shouldFilter={false}` on <CommandDialog>/<Command> so the server-side results are shown as-is.
